chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-69 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: Sawan Khan s/o Jungho Khan Nemo. Respondent No.1: Mst.Habiba w/o Rajab Ali. Nemo. Respondent No.2: Nawaz s/o BakharNarejo. Nemo. Respondent No.3: Shahbaz s/o Yaqoob. Nemo. Respondent No.4: Rajab s/o BakharNarejo. Nemo. Date of hearing: 25.11.2025 Date of decision: 28.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: I had reserved this matter for maintainability of this Criminal Acquittal Appeal. A perusal of the record suggests that the allegations raised in the FIR are not merely limited to tresspass (be at criminal or civil) but could also potentially trigger other provisions of criminal law which may emerge during the course of investigation which coas yet to be concluded when the trial Court passed impugned order. In view of the foregoing, issue notice to the respondents as well as learned A.P.G for 09.12.2025. JUDGE Tufail
